name: Claude Instant
tagline: Original low-latency, lower-cost Claude variant, launched alongside Claude 1.
metaDescription: Claude Instant (Anthropic), released 2023-03-14 — part of the Claude (legacy 1–2.x) line. Original low-latency, lower-cost Claude variant, launched alongside C…
overview: Claude Instant is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude (legacy 1–2.x) line. Released 2023-03-14. Anthropic's pre-Claude-3 models, including the original Claude and the low-latency Claude Instant; all retired.
What's notable in this version: Original low-latency, lower-cost Claude variant, launched alongside Claude 1.
